title: Bulbophyllum bryophilum
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum bryophilum is a species of orchid in the genus Bulbophyllum. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Bulbophyllum is further divided into several subgenera and sections based on morphological characteristics. Bulbophyllum bryophilum is typically classified within the subgenus Bulbophyllum and section Monanthorchis. The classification of Bulbophyllum bryophilum is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of orchid taxonomy.
